title: The making of "Malema II"
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The alleged discharging of a handgun by Bitou deputy mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi that has become national news with various media outlets featuring what could become the remake of Julius Malema II.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The alleged discharging of a handgun by Bitou deputy mayor Nokuzola Kolwapi that has become national news with various media outlets featuring what could become the remake of Julius Malema II."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Like Malema, who previously claimed he was firing a toy gun, Kolwapi stated in a statement that the object she was allegedly seen holding was not a real firearm, but a replica."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Julius Malema, the leader of the EFF, was found guilty in of discharging a firearm (AK-47) in a public area and being in possession of a firearm and ammunition of which he was licenced for.","html":"Julius Malema, the leader of the EFF, was found guilty in of discharging a firearm (AK-47) in a public area and being in possession of a firearm and ammunition of which he was licenced for."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This alleged incident (involving Kolwapi) is a blueprint of the Julius Malema incident, said independent firearm forensic expert Jannie van der Westhuizen, of Wesco Forensic Services.","html":"This alleged incident (involving Kolwapi) is a blueprint of the Julius Malema incident, said independent firearm forensic expert Jannie van der Westhuizen, of Wesco Forensic Services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Malema was found guilty in October of unlawful possession of a firearm, unlawful possession of ammunition, discharge of a firearm in a built-up area, failure to take reasonable precautions to person or property and reckless endangerment to person or property.","html":"Malema was found guilty in October of unlawful possession of a firearm, unlawful possession of ammunition, discharge of a firearm in a built-up area, failure to take reasonable precautions to person or property and reckless endangerment to person or property."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pre-sentencing","html":"Pre-sentencing"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The charges resulted from the 28 July 2018 EFF rally held in Mdantsane, during which Malema fired a rifle in the air, allegedly belonging to a security company of which Adrian Snyman, Malema’s co-accused, was the director.","html":"The charges resulted from the 28 July 2018 EFF rally held in Mdantsane, during which Malema fired a rifle in the air, allegedly belonging to a security company of which Adrian Snyman, Malema’s co-accused, was the director."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The charges were laid by AfriForum in 2018.","html":"The charges were laid by AfriForum in 2018."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Malema is to face a pre-sentencing hearing on 23 January.","html":"Malema is to face a pre-sentencing hearing on 23 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Ratepayers reject deputy mayor’s statement","Bitou deputy mayor under fire","Charges laid over discharge of firearm in Kwanokuthula","Community leader calls for more gun charges","Deputy mayor gunfire: Taurus pistol or toy replica?"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
